category_sources: source_facts.description: command-line utility for managing shell history in a SQLite database.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is historian; source_facts.homepage is the official jcsalterego/historian repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best available documentation surface for the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/jcsalterego/historian; per instructions repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies shell history management in SQLite; source_facts.executables lists the hist command-line executable.
